title: 生成面向智能体的 Agent Map 与知识目录
summary: 新增 Agent Map 生成能力，输出 .ralph/agent-map/overview.json 与 knowledge-catalog.json，复用项目约束、源码上下文、README 和 PRD 构建项目概览、模块地图、规则入口、执行 runbook 与文档目录，并显式记录缺失知识。

tests.command: npm test -- --grep "Agent map generation writes overview and knowledge catalog with explicit gaps|Package exposes a single user-facing UI design command"

riskReasons: The story risk was inferred from the available completion evidence.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 生成面向智能体的 Agent Map 与知识目录.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: ralph/checkpoints/US-039.checkpoint.json, ralph/memory/US-039.json.
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: 后续可增加 Agent Map 新鲜度检查命令，直接消费 knowledge-catalog.json 中的 freshnessTarget 和 lastModified 字段。
如果未来引入更多共享设计上下文，可在 Agent Map 中补充 design context 细粒度索引。
